``Is the pretending to be friends finally over?
"Then I'll mess with them, so you just disappear." ”
It looks like your pretend friendship is coming to an abrupt end. ”
``Are you going to accompany me to school today?
Don't think that will continue forever? ”
If it's true, I was in your position. ”
``What's the point of being an otaku?
We don't have tri-colored cheese topped beef bowl here, right? ”
“I think something fun is about to happen.”
"What, you look pale? Are you sick?
Don't transfer it to me, it's a nuisance. ”
It's not going to be weird, is it? ”
``What's the point of being an otaku?
We don't have tri-colored cheese topped beef bowl here, right? ”
"Did you know? It seems that the number of virgin boys who choose to be alone is increasing.
It seems like women these days are like monsters, so you can't date them in the first place. ”
``Today's high school girls only care about money and popularity.
You don't have the slightest desire to try and accomplish something on your own. ”
“Maybe I should invite a girl around there, or pick up a girl in front of the station...
It's just that women these days have such biased thinking that it's annoying. ”
"You look pale, you're alone today. Maybe you got dumped?
If you feel lonely, you can come to me. I'll give you a brush. ”
“Oh, even though the three of us are together, it seems like our hearts are looking in different directions.
It's strange that we have feelings for each other. ”
``You're bringing a lot of people with you today too, and they look better than yesterday.
Have you done anything nice since morning?　It's a little annoying. ”
``Oh, it seems like they're bringing a lot of people with them, but I can't see them.
There's something wrong with leaving me alone. ”
I've received a lot of lottery tickets today, so I'm not getting tired of it. ”
From that point alone, I wonder if Hosoyama's hand tricks will be helpful. ”
Where would you like a good hunting ground? Is it really SNS? ”
``I thought it would be until I became a college student that I would start eating away at virgins, but...
Otaku-kun...hey. It’s pretty good, I think I’ll try it ♡”
``Pinsaro's unit price is low, but its turnover rate is good.
I wonder if the money is more stable than making money on a dating site as an individual. ”
``Don't you think it's good to have a virgin-specialized brush wholesaler?''
I think I'll open my own business after I graduate. ”
``When you're as popular as I am, you have a lot of free time after school.
"Will you be my partner?" I can afford to just use the brush. ”
